---
title: "Margin Table Cross-ref Test"
papersize: us-letter
grid:
  margin-width: 3.5in
  gutter-width: 0.25in
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        # GT tables in margin divs use #note( wrapping #figure( with crossref label
        - ['#note\(', '<tbl-air>']
        - []
      ensurePdfRegexMatches:
        - ['Table 1']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests cross-references to margin tables using great_tables.

::: {.column-margin}

```{python}
#| classes: plain
#| echo: false
#| label: tbl-air
#| tbl-cap: "NYC Air Quality"

from great_tables import GT
from great_tables.data import airquality

airquality_mini = airquality.head(5)

(
    GT(airquality_mini)
    .tab_header(title="Air Quality")
    .cols_label(
        Ozone="O3",
        Solar_R="Solar",
        Wind="Wind",
        Temp="Temp"
    )
)
```

:::

As shown in @tbl-air, the table appears in the margin with a working cross-reference.

The reference should show "Table 1" or similar.
